title: Task 1: Documentation Standards Audit
summary: Created docs/standards-compliance-matrix.md - comprehensive audit of all 23 plugin CLAUDE.md files against documented standards. Found key issues: root CLAUDE.md says 20 plugins (should be 23), plugins/CLAUDE.md lists 21 (missing kokoro-tts and gitnexus-tools), header format inconsistencies, and incomplete tables in several plugins.
